Superviseur x76 tecsi b2.02

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 32
Func Name: Superviseur

      },
      "position_PRND": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "potar_BVA": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "prop_charge": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },
      "puissance_corrigee": {
        "firstbyte": 40,
        "ref": true
      },
      "puissance_predite": {
        "firstbyte": 36,
        "ref": true
      },
      "puissance_reelle": {
        "firstbyte": 38,
        "ref": true
      },
      "retour_vitesse": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "sdm_valide": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "statut_accel": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "UCME_INFO_mode": {
        "firstbyte": 48,
        "ref": true
      },
      "UCVH_mode": {
        "firstbyte": 49,
        "ref": true
      },
      "UHT_reel": {
        "firstbyte": 43,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  }
]
